scope: device, Level 1, and PED evidence plan for certification package assembly

required_metadata.requirement: SHA-256 of the exact kernel binary installed on the device
SHA-256 of the signed profile, CAPK, and configuration bundle
terminal model, hardware revision, serial scope, OS image, and deployment configuration
terminal firmware, reader firmware, OS image, and PED firmware versions in the submitted scope
contact and contactless Level 1 approval or accepted vendor/lab evidence reference
PCI PTS POI listing, PCI-recognized assessment reference, or assessor-accepted equivalent
claimed contact, contactless, fallback, and excluded interfaces with reason codes
ABI version, profile version, profile SHA-256, trace-pack hash, device scope, and submitted build scope

requirements.authority: device vendor, integrator, acquirer, and laboratory
requirements.required_attachment: target terminal bill of materials, firmware inventory, OS image, and deployment configuration statement
requirements.acceptance_gate: device identity and firmware scope must match the submitted binary, profile bundle, and lab manifest

requirements.authority: EMVCo Level 1 laboratory, device vendor, and integrator
requirements.required_attachment: contact reader L1 approval or accepted vendor/lab evidence tied to firmware and hardware revision
requirements.acceptance_gate: contact reader evidence must name the same device, firmware, binary, and contact interface scope as the submission

requirements.area: contactless reader and C-8 device evidence
requirements.authority: EMVCo contactless approval path, Level 1 laboratory, device vendor, and scheme/acquirer as applicable
requirements.required_attachment: contactless reader/L1 approval, selected C-8 contactless approval package, NFC firmware, and bulletin reconciliation
requirements.acceptance_gate: contactless evidence must match the selected C-8 package, device firmware, reader scope, and masked outcome traces

requirements.authority: PCI SSC, PCI-recognized laboratory, PED vendor, and security assessor
requirements.required_attachment: PCI PTS POI listing or accepted assessment evidence plus PED firmware and integration statement
requirements.acceptance_gate: PED evidence must prove PIN capture and PIN-block custody remain inside the approved PED boundary

requirements.authority: PED vendor, PCI assessor, and product security reviewer
requirements.required_attachment: integration review showing offline VERIFY status and online PIN handoff use opaque handles only
requirements.acceptance_gate: kernel APIs and traces may expose only opaque handles, VERIFY status words, and CVM results, never clear PIN data

requirements.required_attachment: claimed interface matrix naming contact, contactless, alternate-interface, fallback, and excluded paths
requirements.acceptance_gate: claimed interfaces must match signed profile mappings and no excluded interface may be reachable at runtime

requirements.required_attachment: masked trace pack metadata tying device, firmware, ABI version, profile hash, and submitted binary hash together
requirements.acceptance_gate: lab traces must be replayable, masked, and bound to the same submitted binary, profile, device, and firmware scope

requirements.authority: laboratory, acquirer, device vendor, PED vendor, and submission owner
requirements.required_attachment: accepted device, L1, PCI/PED, and integration reports tied to the certification freeze manifest
requirements.acceptance_gate: report package must agree with freeze-manifest hashes and leave no unresolved device, L1, or PED evidence mismatch
